rationale: Both evaluations produced an identical score of 4/10 and rest on the same core concerns: lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, and AI accelerators. The strengths and concerns are merely reworded and reordered between versions, with no new penalty, no shifted reasoning, and notably no mention of the career gap at all in either evaluation. The differences are within ordinary run-to-run wording noise and do not key off the changed gap-end date.
